components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.assessmentBody: Targeted exam elements that change pretest probability — history, focused exam, and interpretation before management jumps.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.diagnosticBlockBody: Open mixed pathway questions to train differentials, red-flag recognition, and evidence-weighting under time pressure.

components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.readinessLead: Adaptive pacing, timer budget, and item band for this pathway — pair with lessons and targeted drills before high-stakes runs.

pages.alliedHealthHub.heroH1: Certification prep for your discipline, not a generic nursing page
pages.alliedHealthHub.heroTestimonial: Allied candidates tell us the stems feel closer to registry exams than random quiz banks.
pages.alliedHealthHub.heroValueLine: Practice exam-style questions, review key protocols, and focus on the concepts most likely to appear on your certification exam.
pages.alliedHealthHub.heroWorkflowLine: Start with a topic, review the concept, then apply it with practice questions and timed sets.
pages.alliedHealthHub.metaDescription: Certification prep for respiratory therapy, medical laboratory, imaging, paramedic, pharmacy technician, rehabilitation, and related allied
pages.alliedHealthHub.professionBrowseLessons: Browse lessons
pages.alliedHealthHub.professionsH2: Choose your profession
pages.alliedHealthHub.professionsIntro: Each track pairs a prep guide with a paginated lesson hub. Questions, lessons, and timed sets stay inside the allied tier, separate from NCL
pages.alliedHealthHub.regionCanadaPricingHint: Checkout uses Canadian billing and the allied subscription tier.
pages.alliedHealthHub.regionIntro: Allied content is scoped by country at signup and checkout. Pick your region first, then your profession below.
pages.alliedHealthHub.regionUnitedStatesPricingHint: Checkout uses US billing and the allied subscription tier.
pages.alliedHealthHub.trustH2: Built for allied certification prep
pages.alliedHealthHub.trustTile1Body: Pick your profession and land on guides and lessons written for that scope, not generic nursing copy.
pages.alliedHealthHub.trustTile2Body: United States and Canada each have a dedicated allied hub so entitlements and checkout match your exam market.
pages.alliedHealthHub.trustTile3Body: Lessons, questions, and practice stay inside the allied plan you select. Upgrade paths are explicit, not mixed in by accident.
pages.alliedHealthHub.whoBody: Built for allied health certifications such as respiratory therapy, paramedic, medical laboratory, imaging, and rehabilitation pathways.
pages.alliedHealthHub.whoHeading: Who this is for
